items.raw_desc: Szelén GreenFood Nutrition Selenium Lalmin® 90 kapszula:GreenFood Nutrition Selenium Lalmin®90 + 20 capsulesThe yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae, known for its nutritional properties, is used to produce Selen Lalmin®. The yeast is grown under controlled conditions on a nutrient medium rich in sugars, minerals and other nutrients. During cultivation, selenium in the form of sodium selenite is added to the culture medium. The yeast absorbs this selenium and incorporates it into its cellular structure. This process is called "biofortification". The yeast continues to grow and ferment, during which it is further enriched with selenium. Fermentation takes place under controlled temperatures and other conditions that promote optimal growth and enrichment. Once the fermentation process is complete, the yeast is harvested, which involves separating the yeast from the culture medium. Iron is one of the indispensable trace elements in the body. Even though we have relatively little of it, it is very important for the body. Iron contributes to the normal transport of oxygen in the body and accounts for two-thirds of the total amount of iron in the blood. Most of the iron in the human body occurs in the form of haemoglobin. It is part of the red blood cells and ensures the transport of oxygen throughout the body. As a form of use we have chosen vegetable capsules made of cellulose. These are also ideal for vegans and vegetarians and also guarantee fast and effective absorption of both micronutrients. items.raw_desc: Javító foltkészlet Tufo Standard megelőző emulzió 50 ml:A Tufo Standard Sealant javító foltkészlet ideális eszköz minden típusú gumiabroncs, tömlős és tömlő nélküli (tubeless), megelőző védelmére a defektek ellen. A tömítőanyagot minden országúti vagy hegyi kerékpár, illetve gravel kerékpár tulajdonosa értékelni fogja, ha köves vagy igényes útvonalra indul, és nem akar tartalék tömlőt magával vinni és kedvezőtlen körülmények között cserélni. Megelőzésként, biciklizés előtt a gumiabroncs belső oldalára kenve is lehet használni. When these pipes are cut, their profile is flattened. Each size of the deburrer has special inner and outer blades on both sides.  With this design, all machined tubes are simultaneously calibrated to give them a perfectly round cross-section to ensure a tight joint, and then deburred to flatten the edges and allow the tube to be pressed evenly against the very end of the joint.
